message:
interactive: move extension UI channel creation inside extensions block

Only create the extension UI request channel when extensions are actually
present. This avoids spawning a receiver task that would run indefinitely
with no extensions to send requests.

Before: Channel created unconditionally, receiver task always spawned
After: Channel created only if extensions exist, receiver scoped to block

This is a minor cleanup that reduces unnecessary async task overhead
when running without extensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
